title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at OYO Rooms - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at OYO Rooms - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, OYO Rooms in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
